Ok ok so I’m gonna private all of my old bots and glow them up, then unprivate them:D

It’ll be nice, especially because i have a inconsistent way of writing my bios and stuff:0

────୨ৎ────

Stop harassing creators because they made a bot YOU personally disagreed with. Yes, its . And i hate bots as well. But i’m not going to go around saying that as if its a parade. It’s the creators choice to make those kinds of bots, and often, they’re an S/A victim themselves.

Its IMMATURE to hate people who weren’t at fault, believe it or not. Your not taking one for the team, your just ridiculing victims or creators. It’s understandable if the sensitive topic is trivialized, romanticized or normalized. Those are times where the creator needs constructive criticism and feedback on how to make the sensitive topic more logical and relevant. Keep this in mind

Anyway bai:3
creator: BlehBLEH
